metadata.description: A marketplace of individually-installable commands and skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: map
plugins.description: Generate or update ARCHITECTURE.md — a living map of a project's structure, dependencies, and high-coupling zones.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Three parallel reviewer agents find contradictions, config gaps, and coverage holes — then fix what you approve.

plugins.name: crap
plugins.description: Rank functions by CRAP score (complexity × lack of real test coverage), then propose a refactor or missing tests for the worst offender.
